sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n83739" key="pleuri/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πλευρ-ίτης</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῑ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n83739.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">connected with ribs,</tr_> of vertebrae, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:178" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.178</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
